creator: dutra@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,
In my poudriere, the patch returns errors:

Info: creating stash file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/mail/datovka/work/datovka-4.23.6/.qmake.stash
Info: creating cache file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/mail/datovka/work/datovka-4.23.6/.qmake.cache
Checking for libcrypto... yes
Checking for libdatovka... no
Project ERROR: The application requires libdatovka-0.5.0 or newer to compile and work properly.
*** Error code 3

We need to update deve/libdatovka
